title: Ansispire EDA Rules (reactor.py rules.json contract)
description: Contract for extensions/eda/rules.json — the rule set reactor.py matches against events read from events.jsonl. Sibling: events.schema.json (event payload). Validation entry: make test-rules-schema.

name.description: Human-readable rule label; also the cooldown bucket key.

enabled.description: Soft-disable without removing the rule. Defaults to true when omitted.

_disabled_reason.description: Optional free-text rationale documenting why enabled=false. Conventional but unused by reactor.

cooldown.description: Suppress duplicate firings within this many seconds. Defaults to 60 in reactor.py.

condition.description: Matched against payload.event.<key>. A key suffixed '_contains' is matched via substring; bare keys are matched via equality. See controller/audit/reactor.py:match_rule.

action_semaphore_api.description: Trigger a Semaphore template via /api/project/{id}/tasks. Either project_id or project_name must be provided; same for template_id or template_name. Name resolution is cached per (project, template) pair.

url.description: POST target. Empty string is tolerated by reactor (logs and skips) but the schema flags it as suspect by requiring the field — set explicitly to '' to acknowledge disabled state.

action_webhook.description: POST a JSON body {rule_action, event} to url. See controller/audit/reactor.py:trigger_webhook.
